value: Shipped in v1.10.0 (#54): file-per-entry layout. Each entry lives in .codexcli/<namespace>.<name>.json with shape {value, meta:{created, updated}}. Sidecars: .codexcli/_aliases.json, .codexcli/_confirm.json. Replaces single .codexcli.json (auto-migrated via atomic tmp-dir-rename, old file renamed to .backup). In-memory shape returned by store.ts is preserved — consumers above the store layer don't change. Key validation via isValidEntryKey (in src/utils/directoryStore.ts) rejects path traversal, prototype pollution, and sidecar name collisions. Hand-editing files unsupported (see conventions.editSurface).
